title: Action Creation via M2M
content:
S->>API: POST /api/v1/actions
Authorization Bearer M2M JWT
Body {title, action_type, priority, tenant_id, ...}

API->>API: Validate M2M scopes
Require actions:write; else 403

Note over API,DB: Same DB operations as SEQ-1 steps 6-9
(workflow, compliance profile, sequence,
INSERT action + history + audit + deadlines)
origin_system recorded on action record
